entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange platform associated with Changelly and focused on professional spot trading.
entity.notes: The first-party PRO platform remains live and provides account creation, trading terminal, wallet, and market features. Launch date remains null because this review does not promote a database-only date to canonical precision.

evidence.title: Changelly PRO official platform
evidence.notes: First-party site presents the current professional exchange platform and trading features.

evidence.title: Changelly PRO exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory corroborates the CEX identity, Seychelles registration, and current market activity.
